verses.geez:
ወአዘዘ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ለመጋቢሁ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ምላእ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ አኅስሊሆሙ ፡ ለእሉ ፡ ዕደው ፡ መጠነ ፡ ይክሉ ፡ ጸዊረ ፡
                  ወደይ ፡ ለለ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ወርቆሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አኅስሊሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph charged the steward of his house, saying, Fill the men's sacks with food, as much as they can carry, and put the money of each in the mouth of his sack.
translations.kjv: And he commanded the steward of his house, saying, Fill the men’s sacks with food, as much as they can carry, and put every man’s money in his sack’s mouth.

verses.geez:
ወኮራየ ፡ እንተ ፡ ብሩር ፡ ደይ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኀስሉ ፡ ለዘ ፡ ይንእስ ፡ ወሤጠ ፡ እክሉሂ ፡ ደይ ፡ ወገብረ ፡ በከመ ፡
                  ይቤሎ ፡ ዮሴፍ ።

translations.lxx: And put my silver cup into the sack of the youngest, and the price of his corn. And it was done according to the word of Joseph, as he said.
translations.kjv: And put my cup, the silver cup, in the sack’s mouth of the youngest, and his corn money. And he did according to the word that Joseph had spoken.

verses.geez: ሶበ ፡ ጎሐ ፡ ጽባሕ ፡ ፈነዎሙ ፡ ለእሙንቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ምስለ ፡ እንስሳሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: The morning dawned, and the men were sent away, they and their asses.
translations.kjv: As soon as the morning was light, the men were sent away, they and their asses.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ወፅኡ ፡ እመንቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ ይርሐቁ ፡ እምሀገር ፡ ነዋኀ ፡ ይቤሎ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ለመጋቤ ፡ ቤቱ ፡
                  ተንሥእ ፡ ዴግኖሙ ፡ ወትልዎሙ ፡ ለእሉ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ወአኀዞሙ ፡ ወበሎሙ ፡ እፎ ፡ ከመ ፡ እኪተ ፡ ትፈድዩኒ ፡ ህየንተ ፡
                  ሠናይ ።

translations.lxx: And when they had gone out of the city, and were not far off, then Joseph said to his steward, Arise, and pursue after the men; and thou shalt overtake them, and say to them, Why have ye returned evil for good?
translations.kjv: And when they were gone out of the city, and not yet far off, Joseph said unto his steward, Up, follow after the men; and when thou dost overtake them, say unto them, Wherefore have ye rewarded evil for good?

verses.geez: ለምንት ፡ ትሰርቁኒ ፡ ገይበ ፡ ብሩር ፡ ዘቦቱ ፡ ይሰቲ ፡ እግዚእየ ፡ እኩየ ፡ ገበርክሙ ፡ በሎሙ ።

translations.lxx: Why have ye stolen my silver cup? is it not this out of which my lord drinks? and he divines augury with it; ye have accomplished evil in that which ye have done.
translations.kjv: Is not this it in which my lord drinketh, and whereby indeed he divineth? ye have done evil in so doing.

verses.geez:
ወሖረ ፡ ወረከቦሙ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ለምንት ፡ ትገብሩ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ወትፈድዩኒ ፡ እኪተ ፡ ህየንተ ፡ ሠናይ ፡ ዘገበርኩ ፡
                  ለክሙ ፡ ወትሰርቁኒ ፡ ገይበ ፡ ብሩር ፡ ዘእግዚእየ ።

translations.lxx: And he found them, and spoke to them according to these words.
translations.kjv: And he overtook them, and he spake unto them these same words.

verses.geez: ወይቤልዎ ፡ ለምንት ፡ ትብል ፡ ከመዝ ፡ እግዚእነ ፡ ሐሰ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ለአግብርቲከ ፡ ኢይገብርዎ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ነገር ።

translations.lxx: And they said to him, Why does our lord speak according to these words? far be it from thy servants to do according to this word.
translations.kjv: And they said unto him, Wherefore saith my lord these words? God forbid that thy servants should do according to this thing:

verses.geez:
ወርቀ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ዘረከብነ ፡ በውስተ ፡ አኅስሊነ ፡ አግባእነ ፡ ኀቤከ ፡ እምድረ ፡ ከናአን ፡ ወእፎኬ ፡ ንሰርቅ ፡
                  እምቤትከ ፡ ወርቀ ፡ አው ፡ ብሩረ ።

translations.lxx: If we brought back to thee out of the land of Chanaan the money which we found in our sacks, how should we steal silver or gold out of the house of thy lord?
translations.kjv: Behold, the money, which we found in our sacks’ mouths, we brought again unto thee out of the land of Canaan: how then should we steal out of thy lord’s house silver or gold?

verses.geez:
ይእዜኒ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ዘረከብከ ፡ ኮራከ ፡ እምኔነ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አግብርቲከ ፡ ለይሙት ፡ ወንሕነሰ ፡ ንኩን ፡ አግብርተ ፡
                  ለእግዚእከ ።

translations.lxx: With whomsoever of thy servants thou shalt find the cup, let him die; and, moreover, we will be servants to our lord.
translations.kjv: With whomsoever of thy servants it be found, both let him die, and we also will be my lord’s bondmen.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ይእዜኒ ፡ ይኩን ፡ በከመ ፡ ትቤሉ ፡ ዘኀቤሁ ፡ ተረክበ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ገይብ ፡ ይኩነነ ፡ ገብረ ፡ ወአንትሙሰ
                  ፡ አንጻሕክሙ ፡ ርእሰክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And he said, Now then it shall be as ye say; with whomsoever the cup shall be found, he shall be my servant, and ye shall be clear.
translations.kjv: And he said, Now also let it be according unto your words: he with whom it is found shall be my servant; and ye shall be blameless.

verses.geez: ወአውረዱ ፡ አኅስሊሆሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ ፍጡነ ፡ ወአኀዙ ፡ ይ[ፍ]ትሑ ፤

translations.lxx: And they hasted, and took down every man his sack on the ground, and they opened every man his sack.
translations.kjv: Then they speedily took down every man his sack to the ground, and opened every man his sack.

verses.geez: እምነ ፡ ዘይልህቅ ፡ እስከ ፡ ዘይንእስ ፡ ወረከበ ፡ ውእተ ፡ ገይበ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ኀስለ ፡ ብንያም ።

translations.lxx: And he searched, beginning from the eldest, until he came to the youngest; and he found the cup in Benjamin's sack.
translations.kjv: And he searched, and began at the eldest, and left at the youngest: and the cup was found in Benjamin’s sack.

verses.geez: ወሠጠጡ ፡ አልባሲሆሙ ፡ ወጸዐኑ ፡ አኅስሊሆሙ ፡ ዲበ ፡ አእዱጊሆሙ ፡ ወገብኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሀገር ።

translations.lxx: And they rent their garments, and laid each man his sack on his ass, and returned to the city.
translations.kjv: Then they rent their clothes, and laded every man his ass, and returned to the city.

verses.geez: [ወቦኡ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡] እንዘ ፡ ዓዲሁ ፡ ሀሎ ፡ [ህየ ፡] ወወድቁ ፡ በገጾሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And Judas and his brethren came in to Joseph, while he was yet there, and fell on the ground before him.
translations.kjv: And Judah and his brethren came to Joseph’s house; for he was yet there: and they fell before him on the ground.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ምንትኑ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ዘገበርክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph said to them, What is this thing that ye have done? know ye not that a man such as I can surely divine?
translations.kjv: And Joseph said unto them, What deed is this that ye have done? wot ye not that such a man as I can certainly divine?

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ምንተ ፡ ንትዋሣእ ፡ ለእግዚእነ ፡ ወምንተ ፡ ንብል ፡ በምንት ፡ ንነጽሕ ፡ ዘእግዚአብሔር ፡ አግብአ ፡
                  ለዐመፃነ ፡ ላዕሌነ ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ባሕቱ ፡ ኮነ ፡ አግብርቶ ፡ ለእግዚእነ ፡ ንሕነሂ ፡ ወዝንቱሂ ፡ ዘተረክበ ፡ በኀቤሁ ፡ ገይብ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And Judas said, What shall we answer to our lord, or what shall we say, or wherein should we be justified? whereas God has discovered the unrighteousness of thy servants; behold, we are slaves to our lord, both we and he with whom the cup has been found.
translations.kjv: And Judah said, What shall we say unto my lord? what shall we speak? or how shall we clear ourselves? God hath found out the iniquity of thy servants: behold, we are my lord’s servants, both we, and he also with whom the cup is found.

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ሐሰ ፡ ሊተ ፡ እስከ ፡ እገብሮ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ነገር ፤ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ዘበላዕሌሁ ፡ ተረክበ ፡ ኮራየ
                  ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ይኩነኒ ፡ ገብረ ፡ ወአንትሙሰ ፡ ሑሩ ፡ ኀበ ፡ አቡክሙ ፡ በዳኅን ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph said, Far be it from me to do this thing; the man with whom the cup has been found, he shall be my servant; but do ye go up with safety to your father.
translations.kjv: And he said, God forbid that I should do so: but the man in whose hand the cup is found, he shall be my servant; and as for you, get you up in peace unto your father.

verses.geez:
ወቀርበ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ኀቤሁ ፡ ወይቤ ፡ ብቍዐኒ ፡ እግዚኦ ፡ አብሐኒ ፡ እንብብ ፡ ቅድሜከ ፡ እግዚእየ ፡ ኢትትመዓዖ ፡
                  ለገብርከ ፡ እስመ ፡ አንተ ፡ እምድኅረ ፡ ፈርዖን ።

translations.lxx: And Judas drew near him, and said, I pray, Sir, let thy servant speak a word before thee, and be not angry with thy servant, for thou art next to Pharao.
translations.kjv: Then Judah came near unto him, and said, Oh my lord, let thy servant, I pray thee, speak a word in my lord’s ears, and let not thine anger burn against thy servant: for thou art even as Pharaoh.

verses.geez: እግዚእ ፡ አንተ ፡ ተስእልኮሙ ፡ ለአግብርቲከ ፡ ወትቤሎሙ ፡ ቦኑ ፡ ዘብክሙ ፡ አበ ፡ አው ፡ እኈ ።

translations.lxx: Sir, thou askedst thy servants, saying, Have ye a father or a brother?
translations.kjv: My lord asked his servants, saying, Have ye a father, or a brother?

verses.geez:
ወንቤለከ ፡ እግዚኦ ፡ ብነ ፡ አበ ፡ አረጋዊ ፡ ወቦ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ንኡሰ ፡ ዘበርሥአቲሁ ፡ ወእኁሁሰ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ሞተ ፡
                  ወውእቱ ፡ ባሕቲቱ ፡ ተርፈ ፡ ለእሙ ፡ ወያፈቅሮ ፡ አቡሁ ።

translations.lxx: And we said to my lord, We have a father, an old man, and he has a son of his old age, a young one, and his brother is dead, and he alone has been left behind to his mother, and his father loves him.
translations.kjv: And we said unto my lord, We have a father, an old man, and a child of his old age, a little one; and his brother is dead, and he alone is left of his mother, and his father loveth him.

verses.geez: ወትቤሎሙ ፡ ለአግብርቲከ ፡ አምጽእዎ ፡ ኀቤየ ፡ ወአዐቅቦ ።

translations.lxx: And thou saidst to thy servants, Bring him down to me, and I will take care of him.
translations.kjv: And thou saidst unto thy servants, Bring him down unto me, that I may set mine eyes upon him.

verses.geez: ወንቤለከ ፡ ኢይክል ፡ ኀዲገ ፡ አቡሁ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሕፃን ፡ ወእመሰ ፡ ኀደጎ ፡ ይመውት ።

translations.lxx: And we said to my lord, The child will not be able to leave his father; but if he should leave his father, he will die.
translations.kjv: And we said unto my lord, The lad cannot leave his father: for if he should leave his father, his father would die.

verses.geez:
ወአንተሰ ፡ ባሕቱ ፡ ትቤሎሙ ፡ ለአግብርቲከ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ኢያምጻእክምዎ ፡ ለእኁክሙ ፡ ዘይንእስ ፡ ኢትሬእዩ ፡ ገጽየ ፡
                  ዳግመ ።

translations.lxx: But thou saidst to thy servants, Except your younger brother come down with you, ye shall not see my face again.
translations.kjv: And thou saidst unto thy servants, Except your youngest brother come down with you, ye shall see my face no more.

verses.geez: ወኮነ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ዐረግነ ፡ ኀበ ፡ አቡነ ፡ ገብርከ ፡ ዜነውናሁ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ዘትቤለነ ፡ እግዚኦ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass, when we went up to thy servant our father, we reported to him the words of our lord.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass when we came up unto thy servant my father, we told him the words of my lord.

verses.geez: ወይቤለነ ፡ አቡነ ፡ ሑሩ ፡ ካዕበ ፡ ተሣየጡ ፡ ለነ ፡ ሕዳጠ ፡ እክለ ።

translations.lxx: And our father said, Go again, and buy us a little food.
translations.kjv: And our father said, Go again, and buy us a little food.

verses.geez:
ወንቤሎ ፡ ንሕነ ፡ ኢንክል ፡ ሐዊረ ፡ እመ ፡ እኁነ ፡ ዘይንእስ ፡ ኢመጽአ ፡ ምስሌነ ፡ እስመ ፡ አንክል ፡ ርእየ ፡
                  ገጹ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ እመ ፡ ኢሀሎ ፡ እኁነ ፡ ምስሌነ ፡ ዘይንእስ ።

translations.lxx: And we said, We shall not be able to go down; but if our younger brother go down with us, we will go down; for we shall not be able to see the man's face, our younger brother not being with us.
translations.kjv: And we said, We cannot go down: if our youngest brother be with us, then will we go down: for we may not see the man’s face, except our youngest brother be with us.

verses.geez: ወይቤለነ ፡ ገብርከ ፡ አቡነ ፡ ታአምሩ ፡ ለሊክሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ክልኤተ ፡ ወለደት ፡ ሊተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ብእሲት ።

translations.lxx: And thy servant our father said to us, Ye know that my wife bore me two sons;
translations.kjv: And thy servant my father said unto us, Ye know that my wife bare me two sons:

verses.geez: ወአሐዱሰ ፡ ወፅአ ፡ እምኀቤየ ፡ ወትቤሉኒ ፡ አርዌ ፡ በልዖ ፡ ወአርኢክዎ ፡ እንከ ፡ ዳግመ ፡ እስከ ፡ ይእዜ ።

translations.lxx: and one is departed from me; and ye said that he was devoured of wild beasts, and I have not seen him until now.
translations.kjv: And the one went out from me, and I said, Surely he is torn in pieces; and I saw him not since:

verses.geez:
ወለእመ ፡ ነሣእክምዎ ፡ ለዝኒ ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጽየ ፡ ወእመቦ ፡ ከመ ፡ ደወየ ፡ በፍኖት ፡ ወታወርድዎ ፡ ለርሥዓንየ ፡
                  በሐዘን ፡ ውስተ ፡ መቃብር ።

translations.lxx: If then ye take this one also from my presence, and an affliction happen to him by the way, then shall ye bring down my old age with sorrow to the grave.
translations.kjv: And if ye take this also from me, and mischief befall him, ye shall bring down my gray hairs with sorrow to the grave.

verses.geez:
ወይእዜኒ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ሖርነ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ገብርከ ፡ አቡነ ፡ ወኢሀሎ ፡ ምስሌነ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ሕፃን ፡ እስመ ፡ ተሰቅለት ፡
                  ነፍሱ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ሕፃን ፤

translations.lxx: Now then, if I should go in to thy servant, and our father, and the boy should not be with us, (and his life depends on this lad's life)—
translations.kjv: Now therefore when I come to thy servant my father, and the lad be not with us; seeing that his life is bound up in the lad’s life;

verses.geez:
ወእምከመ ፡ ርእየ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢሀሎ ፡ ምስሌነ ፡ ይመውት ፡ ወና[ወ]ርዶ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መቃብር ፡ በጻዕር ፡ ወለርሥዓኒሁ ፡
                  ለገብርከ ፡ አቡነ ።

translations.lxx: it shall even come to pass, when he sees the boy is not with us, that he will die, and thy servants will bring down the old age of thy servant, and our father, with sorrow to the grave.
translations.kjv: It shall come to pass, when he seeth that the lad is not with us, that he will die: and thy servants shall bring down the gray hairs of thy servant our father with sorrow to the grave.

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ ገብርከ ፡ ተሐበዮ ፡ ለዝ ፡ ሕፃን ፡ እምኀበ ፡ አቡሁ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ኢያግባእክዎ ፡ ኀቤከ ፡
                  ወኢያቀምክዎ ፡ ቅድሜከ ፡ ጊጉየ ፡ ለእኩን ፡ ላዕሌከ ፡ አባ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ ሕይወትየ ።

translations.lxx: For thy servant has received the boy in charge from his father, saying, If I bring him not to thee, and place him before thee, I shall be guilty towards my father for ever.
translations.kjv: For thy servant became surety for the lad unto my father, saying, If I bring him not unto thee, then I shall bear the blame to my father for ever.

verses.geez:
ወይእዜኒ ፡ እከውነከ ፡ ገብረ ፡ ህየንተዝ ፡ ሕፃን ፡ ወእነብር ፡ ኀቤከ ፡ እግዚኦ ፡ ወሕፃንሰ ፡ ይሑር ፡ ምስለ ፡
                  አኀዊሁ ።

translations.lxx: Now then I will remain a servant with thee instead of the lad, a domestic of my lord; but let the lad go up with his brethren.
translations.kjv: Now therefore, I pray thee, let thy servant abide instead of the lad a bondman to my lord; and let the lad go up with his brethren.

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ ኢይክል ፡ ሐዊረ ፡ ኀበ ፡ አቡነ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ኢሀሎ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ሕፃን ፡ ኀቤነ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢይርአይ ፡ እኪተ ፡
                  እንተ ፡ ትረክቦ ፡ ለአቡነ ።

translations.lxx: For how shall I go up to my father, the lad not being with us? lest I behold the evils which will befal my father.
translations.kjv: For how shall I go up to my father, and the lad be not with me? lest peradventure I see the evil that shall come on my father.
